creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

bug 200900 contains an update to mail/opendkim. With this new version some functionality has been removed from that port, and this prevents this one from compiling successfully.

I made a quick and dirty patch which allows it to compile by removing all references to the functions removed from the opendkim port.

Can you review and maybe test the resulting port and approve this?

Thanks.
